headline: Tyson Foods Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results Available on the Company’s Investor Relations Website
summary: SPRINGDALE, Ark., May 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE: TSN) today announced its second quarter 2026 financial results through an earnings release available on the company’s Investor Relations website at https://ir.tyson.com. Management will host a conference call and webcast beginning at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time (8:00 a.m. Central Time). The earnings release will be furnished with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on a Form 8-K. Webcast A link for the webcast of the

headline: Tyson Foods Stock Rises on Earnings. Protein Demand Remains Hot—Except for Beef.
summary: FEATURE   Tyson Foods stock rose Monday after the meat processor reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings. The company posted adjusted earnings of 87 cents a share for its fiscal second quarter, down from 92 cents a year ago but ahead of analysts’ consensus estimate of 78 cents.

content.title: Tyson Foods Stock Rises on Earnings. Protein Demand Remains Hot—Except for Beef.
content.summary: FEATURE   Tyson Foods stock rose Monday after the meat processor reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings. The company posted adjusted earnings of 87 cents a share for its fiscal second quarter, down from 92 cents a year ago but ahead of analysts’ consensus estimate of 78 cents.

headline: Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Meat company Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.4% year on year to $13.65 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.87 per share was 11.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
